data.name: Integration of tactile and force sensors

data.description: Model-Based Capacitive Touch Sensing in Soft Robotics: Achieving Robust Tactile Interactions for Artistic Applications mentions Thermal Simulation.
Model-Based Capacitive Touch Sensing in Soft Robotics: Achieving Robust Tactile Interactions for Artistic Applications discusses Integration of tactile and force sensors.
Model-Based Capacitive Touch Sensing in Soft Robotics: Achieving Robust Tactile Interactions for Artistic Applications mentions Intel RealSense Depth Camera.
